queries.question: The distinct patient_id values appearing in appointments.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM appointments

queries.question: The patient_id of every row in appointments, duplicates included.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT patient_id FROM appointments

queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM orders

queries.question: The customer_id of every row in orders, duplicates included.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT customer_id FROM orders

queries.question: Distinct patient ids with a 'completed' appointment.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM appointments WHERE status = 'completed'

queries.question: Patient ids of 'completed' appointments (one per appointment).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT patient_id FROM appointments WHERE status = 'completed'

queries.question: Distinct patient ids with a 'completed' checkup appointment.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM appointments WHERE status = 'completed' AND visit_type = 'checkup'

queries.question: Distinct patient ids with a 'cancelled' appointment.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM appointments WHERE status = 'cancelled'

queries.question: Patient ids of 'cancelled' appointments (one per appointment).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT patient_id FROM appointments WHERE status = 'cancelled'

queries.question: Distinct patient ids with a 'cancelled' checkup appointment.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM appointments WHERE status = 'cancelled' AND visit_type = 'checkup'

queries.question: Distinct product ids ordered at least once (electronics only).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT oi.product_id FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = 'electronics'

queries.question: Product ids of every electronics order line (duplicates kept).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT oi.product_id FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = 'electronics'

queries.question: Distinct product ids ordered at least once (furniture only).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT oi.product_id FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = 'furniture'

queries.question: Product ids of every furniture order line (duplicates kept).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT oi.product_id FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = 'furniture'

queries.question: Distinct product ids ordered at least once (home only).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT oi.product_id FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = 'home'

queries.question: Product ids of every home order line (duplicates kept).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT oi.product_id FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE p.category = 'home'

queries.question: All patient_id values from patients.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT patient_id FROM patients

queries.question: Both patient_id and patient_name for every row of patients.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT patient_id, patient_name FROM patients

notes: different column counts: pairwise comparison is expected to be unknown/unsupported

queries.question: Distinct player ids batting in 2015.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT playerID FROM Batting WHERE yearID = 2015

queries.question: Player ids of all 2015 batting stints (duplicates kept).
queries.reference_sql: SELECT playerID FROM Batting WHERE yearID = 2015

queries.question: Distinct player ids batting in 2015 with 10+ homers.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT playerID FROM Batting WHERE yearID = 2015 AND HR >= 10

queries.question: Distinct player ids batting in 2019.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT playerID FROM Batting WHERE yearID = 2019

queries.question: Player ids of all 2019 batting stints (duplicates kept).

queries.question: Distinct player ids batting in 2019 with 10+ homers.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT playerID FROM Batting WHERE yearID = 2019 AND HR >= 10

queries.question: Distinct product ids of Red products ever sold.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT DISTINCT d.ProductID FROM SalesOrderDetail d JOIN Product p ON d.ProductID = p.ProductID WHERE p.Color = 'Red'

queries.question: Product ids of every Red sale line, duplicates included.
queries.reference_sql: SELECT d.ProductID FROM SalesOrderDetail d JOIN Product p ON d.ProductID = p.ProductID WHERE p.Color = 'Red'
